query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.status, a.tipoArquivo, a.direcao, a.url,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedimentos WHERE arquivoId = a.id) as total_procs
FROM arquivos a 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%demonstrativo%' OR a.nome LIKE '%0282629%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
